zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 哈喽，刚看你一路都没怎么说话，状态不太对呀？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 唉，刚才跟项目组闹了点矛盾，正憋得慌呢。

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 哈哈我就说，我这正打算看看你近况咋样，果然有情况。

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 还是你懂我，其他人都没看出来我不对劲。

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 那必须啊，咱们认识这么久，我扫一眼就知道你情绪好不好。
zh.highlight: 扫一眼就知道你情绪好不好

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 太感动了，走，我请你喝奶茶，顺便跟你吐槽吐槽。

en.speaker: A
en.text: Hey, you barely said a word all the way here, is everything okay?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Ugh, I just had a conflict with my project team, I'm so frustrated right now.

en.speaker: A
en.text: Haha I knew it, I was about to do a **vibe check** on you and I was right, something's up.

en.speaker: B
en.text: You know me so well, no one else noticed I was off.

en.speaker: A
en.text: Of course, we've known each other for ages, I can tell your mood with just one glance.

en.speaker: B
en.text: That's so sweet of you, c'mon, I'll treat you to bubble tea and rant about it on the way.

definitions.en: (informal) An act of intentionally checking someone's current emotional state, or the overall atmosphere of a social situation to see if everything is going well.
definitions.zh: （非正式）情绪/氛围检查，指主动确认某人当下的情绪状态，或是某个社交场合的整体氛围是否顺畅

definitions.en: (internet slang) A casual interactive prompt usually posted on social media, asking others to share their current status or mood.
definitions.zh: （网络俚语）状态征集，通常是发布在社交平台的非正式互动提示，号召大家分享自己当下的状态或心情

examples.en: I did a quick **vibe check** on my little sister after her exam, and it turns out she aced it.
examples.zh: 考试结束后我快速问了下我妹妹的状态，发现她考得特别好

examples.en: Before starting the party, we did a **vibe check** to make sure no one felt left out.
examples.zh: 派对开始前我们确认了下大家的状态，确保没人觉得被冷落了

examples.en: The blogger posted a **vibe check** on his Instagram story, and thousands of fans replied with their current mood.
examples.zh: 这个博主在他的Ins快拍上发了个状态征集，成千上万的粉丝回复了自己当下的心情

collocations.zh: 发布状态征集（社交平台场景）
